data.title: Roblox's daily active users in the fourth quarter were lower than expected, and it plunged 18% before the market opened.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Roblox, known as the first stock in the metaverse, had 85.3 million daily active users in the fourth quarter, while the market forecast was 88.39 million. Perhaps because the relevant data was lower than expected, Roblox plunged 18% before the market opened. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ceffu transfers 3,808 BTC to Binance, worth about $374 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to WhaleAlert monitoring, Binance's institutional custody platform Ceffu transferred 3,808 BTC to Binance, about US$374,429,146.

data.title: DeepSeek: No virtual currency has been issued
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Regarding whether it has issued virtual currency, DeepSeek said that it has never issued any virtual currency. Please pay attention to identification and rational investment to avoid property losses. (Jinshi)

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending February 1 was 219,000, compared with expectations of 213,000 and a previous value of 208,000.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending February 1 was 219,000, which was expected to be 213,000. The previous value was revised from 207,000 to 208,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tether Partners With UAE Real Estate Platform For Educational Initiative
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether has signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) with UAE-based real estate B2B platform Reelly Tech. The collaboration aims to develop an interactive educational series to be promoted on Reelly Tech's platform. This initiative is designed to assist agents in exploring the transformative potential of stablecoins in real estate transactions and understanding practical applications, such as using USDT transfers for property purchases.

data.title: RWA end-to-end solution Fraktion completes 110 euro seed round of financing, with Tezos Foundation and others participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News RWA end-to-end solution Fraktion announced the completion of a 110 euro seed round of financing, with participation from Cabrit Capital, Tezos Foundation, Vox Capital, and well-known angel investors such as Olivier Huby (formerly MFEX), Andréa Bensaïd (Eskimoz) or Guillaume Mayot (Lukeion). Fraktion will be launched on the Tezos blockchain in mid-2023, and the new funds are intended to be used to accelerate the development of its technology platform and expand its influence in the field of real-world assets. (chainwire)

data.title: Hyperliquid launches BERA perpetual contract, supporting up to 5x leverage trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Hyperliquid, in response to community requests, Berachain ($BERA) perpetual contract trading is now supported, providing up to 5 times leverage, and users can do long or short operations. The official emphasized that the launch does not represent recognition of the project, and reminded users to trade cautiously, fully understand the risks, and not invest in assets they are not familiar with.

data.title: Galaxy to provide digital asset staking services through BitGo
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Galaxy Digital Holdings announced that it has been included in the list of pledge providers integrated with digital asset custody service provider BitGo Trust Company, Inc., which means that this cooperation combines Galaxy's blockchain infrastructure, lending and trading services with BitGo Trust's custody solutions to provide users with digital asset pledge services. (crowdfundinsider)

data.title: DeepSeek AI Ban: Hawley’s Bill Seeks to Cut US-China AI Ties, Impose Jail Time
data.description:
U.S. Senator Josh Hawley has proposed a new bill that seeks to block the import and export of artificial intelligence technologies between the U.S. and China, citing national security threats. The bill, titled the “Decoupling America’s Artificial Intelligence Capabilities from China Act,” does not specifically reference the Chinese AI company DeepSeek. Instead, it emphasized the broader goal...
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/02/06/deepseek-ai-ban-hawleys-bill-seeks-to-cut-us-china-ai-ties-impose-jail-time/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=deepseek-ai-ban-hawleys-bill-seeks-to-cut-us-china-ai-ties-impose-jail-time

data.title: Berachain Foundation: BERA NFT airdrop is now available
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Berachain Foundation posted on the X platform that the BERA NFT airdrop is now available. Users must bridge NFTs from Ethereum to Berachain to receive the Bera NFT allocation.
